event: The Inferno, Canto 28 - The Sowers of Discord
symbols: winged demon with sword — the executioner of divine justice in the circle of the sowers of discord
mutilated and suffering figures — the contrapasso punishment, their bodies divided as they divided others
two robed observers — Dante and Virgil witnessing the justice of hell
barren rocky landscape — the desolation of the infernal realm
description: A monochrome engraving depicting a scene from Dante's Inferno. Two robed figures stand at left, observing a group of naked, mutilated souls sprawled and contorted on rocky ground. Above them on a high rock, a winged demonic figure with bat-like wings holds a sword aloft. The damned souls display various wounds and disfigurements, writhing in agony. The landscape is barren and rocky, rendered in fine cross-hatching creating deep shadows and dramatic contrasts.
